spec_match.rationale: The toggle still exercises auto, spaces, and legacy none on actual ruby markup.

interactive.rationale: Chrome DevTools MCP clicked all three controls and verified stage dataset, aria-pressed state, and live metric updates.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The feature card describes the same basic overhang toggle shown on the page.

edge_cases.rationale: The stage now includes a spaced stress line and visible width/height/computed-value metrics so subtle layout differences are inspectable.

references.rationale: Cites the ChromeStatus feature link in the see-also section.

design_system.rationale: Uses shared CSS variables and explicit active button color pairs.

summary: Ruby Overhang Toggle now has a deliberate whitespace stress line plus live metrics. DevTools MCP verified all three controls, metrics, links, and no console errors.
